page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. There are no integrated GPUs on this instance.

Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as caching layers, relational databases, in-memory data processing, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density.

It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.4 GHz, delivering 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The instance features 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU, which classifies it as a memory-optimized resource. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage for data persistence. Network performance is defined by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

tagline: A dedicated single-threaded compute instance featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and baseline network performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
